user.title: Add Inkbird INT-14-BW
user.description:
Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your thermometer. You can find it in the Inkbird app under Settings → Device Information.

Devices seen so far: {discovered}

confirm.title: Add Inkbird INT-14-BW
confirm.description: Do you want to set up the Inkbird INT-14-BW at {address}?

error.invalid_address: That doesn't look like a valid Bluetooth MAC address (expected format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

abort.not_supported: This device is not a supported Inkbird INT-14-BW.
